capture_scope: public official metadata and small metadata responses only; no large product acquisition

source_classes.source_class: Burn Severity Portal BAER/RAVG/MTBS fire bundles
source_classes.live_identity: 37 products across 23 current Deschutes MTBS events
source_classes.resolution_or_scale: typically 30 m raster plus vector/metadata products; inspect each bundle
source_classes.temporal_relationship: program-specific immediate, initial, or extended post-fire assessment
source_classes.role: cross-program reference and optical interpretation support
source_classes.label_truth_status: never automatic truth; analyst/model/product limitations remain binding
source_classes.terms_status: public catalog reconnaissance resolved; exact bundle notices govern redistribution

source_classes.source_class: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area
source_classes.live_identity: Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area (BA) Product
source_classes.resolution_or_scale: 30 m; fixed U.S. ARD tiles; CONUS 1984-present
source_classes.temporal_relationship: acquisition-based burn probability and thresholded burn classification
source_classes.label_truth_status: not ground truth; QA, commission/omission, water/shadow, coverage, and optical checks required
source_classes.terms_status: no Landsat use restrictions; cite the dataset; advertised asset retrieval currently redirects to EROS authentication

source_classes.source_class: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance
source_classes.live_identity: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 UTM Surface Reflectance (SR) Product
source_classes.resolution_or_scale: 30 m surface reflectance plus QA bands
source_classes.role: optical corroboration, time-series comparison, and affirmative unchanged support
source_classes.label_truth_status: imagery and QA are evidence, not labels
source_classes.terms_status: no Landsat use restrictions; cite the dataset

source_classes.resolution_or_scale: 10/20/60 m bands; BurnLens uses native grids
source_classes.role: primary high-resolution optical evidence for the preserved task
source_classes.label_truth_status: dNBR, SCL, and imagery do not independently create truth
source_classes.terms_status: free/open under the Sentinel legal notice with attribution

source_classes.role: incident identity, AOI, and perimeter context
source_classes.label_truth_status: dynamic reference; not a legal document or pixel-perfect burn boundary
source_classes.terms_status: public official service; source disclaimer and attribution remain binding

source_classes.live_identity: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Direct Broadcast Burned Area Monthly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061 / VIIRS/NPP Burned Area Monthly L4 Global 500m SIN Grid V002
source_classes.temporal_relationship: monthly burn-date detection from reflectance and active-fire inputs
source_classes.label_truth_status: rejected as 10-30 m label truth or boundary evidence
source_classes.terms_status: NASA-led data default CC0 unless marked; cite and do not imply endorsement

source_classes.temporal_relationship: choose the pre-fire year or same-release comparison years
source_classes.role: land-cover context, stratification, and RAVG applicability screening
source_classes.label_truth_status: land cover is not fire evidence or affirmative background by itself
source_classes.terms_status: USGS data release is CC0 1.0; cite the dataset

candidates.known_context: Previously visible as Milli and excluded because no single Sentinel-2 tile covered the complete MTBS boundary. Landsat ARD uses a different fixed tiling system and is worth metadata-level reconsideration; full boundary coverage remains unproved.
